ucs.title: [LLM] FIN8 (Syssphinx) SARDONIC backdoor: PowerShell in-memory .NET loader from macro-spawned shell
ucs.description: Hunts FIN8's signature SARDONIC/BADHATCH execution chain where a macro-enabled lure (.doc/.xls) spawns powershell.exe that reflectively loads a .NET assembly via [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load with -EncodedCommand and base64-decoded shellcode. This chain — Office app → cmd/wscript → powershell with -enc + Reflection.Assembly — is the documented loader for FIN8's SARDONIC C++ backdoor used as a ransomware (BlackCat/ALPHV, Ragnar, White Rabbit) precursor.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_id) as pid values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("winword.exe","excel.exe","outlook.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe") Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" (Processes.process="*-enc*" OR Processes.process="*-EncodedCommand*" OR Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*Reflection.Assembly*" OR Processes.process="*::Load(*" OR Processes.process="*IEX *" OR Processes.process="*-w hidden*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_guid | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval susp_score = if(match(process,"(?i)-enc"),1,0) + if(match(process,"(?i)Reflection\.Assembly"),2,0) + if(match(process,"(?i)FromBase64String"),1,0) + if(match(process,"(?i)-w\s+hidden"),1,0) | where susp_score >= 2 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("winword.exe","excel.exe","outlook.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe")
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe" or FileName =~ "pwsh.exe"
| extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| where cmd has_any ("-enc","-encodedcommand","frombase64string","reflection.assembly","::load(","iex ","-w hidden","-windowstyle hidden")
| extend score = toint(cmd has "-enc") + 2 * toint(cmd has "reflection.assembly") + toint(cmd has "frombase64string") + toint(cmd has "-w hidden")
| where score >= 2
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, score, ReportId
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: FIN8/Syssphinx (Mandiant, Symantec, Bitdefender reporting Aug 2021–2023) consistently chains macro-laden spearphishing lures (hospitality/retail/insurance themed) into a PowerShell stager that base64-decodes and reflectively loads SARDONIC's .NET stub before APC-injecting the C++ payload. The Office/script-host → powershell.exe -enc + Reflection.Assembly combination is uncommon in legitimate enter

ucs.title: [LLM] FIN8 WMI Event Subscription persistence + remote WMI lateral movement to POS/finance hosts
ucs.description: Detects FIN8's hallmark ActiveScriptEventConsumer / CommandLineEventConsumer persistence created via WMI plus subsequent remote-WMI (wmic /node, Win32_Process Create) execution against domain-joined POS, hospitality, or finance servers — the technique combination used to deploy BADHATCH/SARDONIC and stage ransomware (BlackCat, Ragnar Locker, White Rabbit).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND (Processes.process="*/node:*" OR Processes.process="*process call create*" OR Processes.process="*ActiveScriptEventConsumer*" OR Processes.process="*CommandLineEventConsumer*" OR Processes.process="*__EventFilter*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*Set-WmiInstance*" OR Processes.process="*Register-WmiEvent*" OR Processes.process="*__EventFilter*" OR Processes.process="*ActiveScriptEventConsumer*" OR Processes.process="*CommandLineEventConsumer*" OR Processes.process="*FilterToConsumerBinding*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_guid | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | join type=left dest [| tstats summariesonly=t count as remote_wmi_to_dest from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" Processes.process="*/node:*" by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`] | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let wmi_persistence =
  DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
  | where (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("ActiveScriptEventConsumer","CommandLineEventConsumer","__EventFilter","FilterToConsumerBinding","process call create"))
     or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Set-WmiInstance","Register-WmiEvent","ActiveScriptEventConsumer","CommandLineEventConsumer","__EventFilter","FilterToConsumerBinding"))
  | project PersistTime=Timestamp, PersistDevice=DeviceName, PersistUser=AccountName, PersistCmd=ProcessCommandLine, PersistParent=InitiatingProcessFileName;
let remote_wmi =
  DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
  | where FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "/node:" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("process call create","call create")
  | project RemoteTime=Timestamp, RemoteDevice=DeviceName, RemoteUser=AccountName, RemoteCmd=ProcessCommandLine;
wmi_persistence
| join kind=inner remote_wmi on $left.PersistDevice == $right.RemoteDevice
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', PersistTime, RemoteTime)) <= 60
| project PersistTime, RemoteTime, Device=PersistDevice, User=PersistUser, PersistCmd, RemoteCmd, PersistParent
| order by PersistTime desc
ucs.rationale: FIN8 (CrowdStrike-tracked criminal/RU-nexus actor, Mandiant cluster Syssphinx) is documented by Bitdefender (2021 SARDONIC report) and Symantec (2023 Syssphinx update) as using WMI Event Subscription consumers as their primary persistence and using wmic /node Win32_Process Create for lateral movement to POS, retail, and finance servers prior to BlackCat/Ragnar Locker deployment.
